title: Add support for secrets handling in podman
body:
We need to support secrets in podman, so that RHEL subscriptions can be
used within the container.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @umohnani8 Here is my version of the secrets patch.

This PR conflicts with @umohnani8 patch https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/544,  I think we should separate out secrets into pkg/secrets rather then directly into libpod.  Once this patch gets merged we can remove secrets.go from buildah and use it directly from libpod.
@rhatdan should I close my PR #544 then?
@rhatdan I have pulled in your changes in #544. This can be closed.
